functions.name: load_routing

functions.name: save_routing
functions.signature: def save_routing(project_dir: str | Path, data: dict) -> None

functions.name: init_routing
functions.description: 初始化空 routing.toml（project create 时调用）

functions.name: add_channel
functions.signature: def add_channel(project_dir: str | Path, channel_id: str, *, feishu_chat_id: str | None = None, squad_chat_id: str | None = None, squad_thread_root: str | None = None, default_agents: list[str] | None = None) -> None
functions.description: 添加 channel 条目到 routing.toml

functions.name: list_channels
functions.description: 返回所有 channel 的列表

functions.name: channel_exists
functions.signature: def channel_exists(project_dir: str | Path, channel_id: str) -> bool
functions.description: 检查 channel 是否已注册

functions.name: join_agent
functions.signature: def join_agent(project_dir: str | Path, channel_id: str, role: str, nick: str) -> None
functions.description: 把 agent nick 登记为 channel 的某 role

functions.signature: def remove_channel(project_dir: str | Path, channel_id: str) -> None
